summary: Iteration 12: Backend testing of NEW implant indications feature. All 16 tests PASSED (100% success rate). Verified: indication field present on all 42 systems, NobelActive NP has restricted_teeth [41,42,31,32,12,22], Osstem MS has restricted_teeth [31,32,33,41,42,43], Neodent Helix GM Acqua has indication but NO restricted_teeth, BioHorizons Tapered Pro has correct indication about Immediate Placement and esthetic zone, Straumann BLT has empty indication, suggest endpoint works correctly, tooth recommendations returns 28 teeth.

minor.note: IMPLANT_INDICATIONS has 17 entries, not 18 as stated in user requirements. All 17 are correctly implemented: Neodent(5), Noble Biocare(3), NeoBiotech(1), Osstem(5), BioHorizons(3) = 17 total.

critical_code_review_comments: IMPLANT_INDICATIONS dict correctly maps 17 systems to their clinical indications
restricted_teeth field only present when applicable (NobelActive NP and Osstem MS)
indication field returns empty string ('') for systems without indications (25 systems)
get_implant_systems endpoint correctly merges indication data from IMPLANT_INDICATIONS dict
Titamax GM Acqua correctly has NO indication (only Titamax GM NeoPorous has one)
suggest and tooth-recommendations endpoints continue to work correctly after changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implant indications feature fully tested. 17 systems have clinical indications (not 18). 2 systems (NobelActive NP and Osstem MS) have restricted_teeth arrays. All 42 systems return indication field (empty string if no indication). Frontend testing skipped per request.
